ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the order to appear that was issued on January 14, 2021 informed John-Michael Barros that if there was no appearance, the petition would be taken off calendar. There being no appearance at today's hearing and no appearance at the previous hearing, the Petition for Letters of Administration and the order to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Continued To Feb-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner John-Michael Barros to appear on February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes/tentative ruling have not been addressed, and to show why the petition should not be taken off calendar. If there is no appearance at the order to appear, the petition will go off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
